message:
fix(sync,replay_pack): use saturating_mul for timeout, prefer backend.ok rollout stage, and make atomic rename portable

Use saturating_mul instead of plain multiplication when converting timeout
seconds to milliseconds to prevent overflow at u64::MAX. In replay_pack,
prefer the backend.ok event over routing.decision_contract when resolving
native_rollout_stage so the final authoritative value wins. Extract a
replace_file_atomically helper in sync that uses plain rename on Unix
(which is already atomic) and only falls back to remove-then-rename on
non-Unix platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
